chapter_title.en: Chapter 3 – The Equipment of the animals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/461)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/461)
text: عَلِيَّ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ يَرْكَبُ عَلَى قَطِيفَةٍ حَمْرَاءَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Hashim, from Ibrahim Bin Abu Yahya Al Madainy,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that Ali<sup>asws</sup> Bin Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> was riding upon red velvet’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn Ali from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn abu Hashim from Ibrahim ibn abu Yahya al-Madiniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that ‘Ali ibn al-Husayn, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, rode on a piece of marigold red color cloth.’”
